Joinery division

Joinery that fits right and lasts

Fitted furniture, staircase work, structural carpentry, loft conversions, kitchens and more — for homes and businesses across the Northwest.

Get a quote View full services
Typical projects

Typical joinery jobs

  • Built-in furniture that needs to fit difficult spaces cleanly.
  • Structural and first-fix carpentry tied into wider renovation work.
  • Stair, loft and kitchen projects where clean fitting matters.

Joinery work

Joinery work we cover

Main areas we cover. For full detail on each service, see joinery services.

Built-in joinery

Media walls and alcove units

Custom-built media walls, alcove cabinetry and shelving designed to give a room a cleaner layout and more useful built-in storage.

Domestic stair work

Stair refurbishment

Updated flights, handrails, balustrades and newel details to improve the look, safety and finish of an existing staircase.

First-fix carpentry

Structural and first-fix carpentry

Stud walls, timber framing, floor structures and first-fix carpentry completed as part of wider renovation, conversion and refurbishment works.

Loft work

Loft conversions

Structural joinery and first-fix work for loft conversions — from floor and framing through to usable space under the roof.

External timber work

Fencing, gates and external timberwork

Bespoke timber fencing, side gates and external joinery including outbuilding doors, built for durability, privacy and a clean finish.

Kitchen fitting

Kitchen installations

Kitchen fitting and installation work including cabinetry, finishing joinery and precise fitting to create a clean, functional result.

See full joinery service detail

Our approach

Measure properly, fit it well, finish it neatly

The best joinery looks like it was always there. That comes from measuring twice, taking the time to get it right and not cutting corners on the finish.

"Straightforward work, done properly."

Free quotations

Need a quote for joinery work?

Tell us what you need and we will come out, have a look and give you a clear price.

Get a quote Call 07939 551481
Marlborough Builders Joinery and roofing specialists

Family-run building company based in Prescot, delivering joinery and roofing work across Merseyside and the wider Northwest.
